meta.importedFrom: Unit 1 Passage 1 Saying goodbye to my years up high（互动课文教学动画）英语新教材外研版八年级下册.html

article.title: Saying goodbye to my years up high
article.summary: 在回望过往经历的告别演讲中梳理成长和幸福感。

sentences.text: Hello, everyone.
sentences.tr: 大家好。
sentences.d: 这是一个简单的问候语，使用了感叹词 hello 和不定代词 everyone。

sentences.text: It's so nice to see you on my last day at work.
sentences.tr: 在我工作的最后一天见到你们真是太好了。
sentences.g: 主系表结构 + 不定式作真正主语
sentences.d: It 是形式主语，真正的主语是 to see you on my last day at work。so nice 是表语，表达强烈的情感。

sentences.text: The past 30 years were filled with both challenges and joys.
sentences.tr: 过去的30年充满了挑战和快乐。
sentences.d: were filled with 是被动语态，both...and... 连接两个并列名词 challenges 和 joys。

sentences.text: All my days up high in the air will be kept in my memory.
sentences.tr: 我在高空中的所有日子都将被保存在我的记忆中。
sentences.g: 主谓结构（被动语态 + 将来时）
sentences.d: will be kept 是将来时的被动语态，up high in the air 是后置定语修饰 days。

sentences.text: I still remember my first summer as a "spiderman".
sentences.tr: 我仍然记得我作为蜘蛛侠的第一个夏天。
sentences.d: remember 是及物动词，my first summer 是宾语，as a spiderman 是介词短语作状语。

sentences.text: It was a day much hotter than today!
sentences.tr: 那是比今天热得多的一天！
sentences.g: 主系表结构 + 比较级
sentences.d: much hotter than today 是比较级结构，much 用于加强比较级程度。

sentences.text: I was wet all over.
sentences.tr: 我全身都湿透了。
sentences.d: all over 是副词短语，表示到处、全身。

sentences.text: Drops of sweat fell in my eyes.
sentences.tr: 汗珠落入我的眼睛。
sentences.d: Drops of sweat 是主语，fell 是不及物动词，in my eyes 是地点状语。

sentences.text: When I opened them, I saw a juicy watermelon.
sentences.tr: 当我睁开眼睛时，我看到了一个多汁的西瓜。
sentences.g: 时间状语从句 + 主句
sentences.d: When 引导时间状语从句，主句是 I saw a juicy watermelon。

sentences.text: It was carefully cut into small pieces.
sentences.tr: 它被小心地切成小块。
sentences.d: was cut 是被动语态，carefully 是副词修饰动词，into small pieces 是结果状语。

sentences.text: A kind woman was smiling brightly at me from inside the building.
sentences.tr: 一位善良的女士从建筑物内对我灿烂地微笑。
sentences.d: was smiling 是过去进行时，brightly 是副词修饰动词，from inside the building 是地点状语。

sentences.text: That was the sweetest watermelon of my life.
sentences.tr: 那是我一生中最甜的西瓜。
sentences.g: 主系表结构 + 最高级
sentences.d: the sweetest 是最高级，of my life 是范围状语。

sentences.text: I'm reminded of some other friends I met through the glass.
sentences.tr: 我想起了一些我透过玻璃遇见的其他朋友。
sentences.g: 主谓结构（被动语态）+ 定语从句
sentences.d: I'm reminded of 是被动语态，I met through the glass 是省略了关系代词的定语从句修饰 friends。

sentences.text: There was this sweet newborn baby.
sentences.tr: 有一个可爱的新生婴儿。
sentences.d: There was 表示存在，this 用于强调特指。

sentences.text: I watched her grow bit by bit.
sentences.tr: 我看着她一点一点地成长。
sentences.d: watched 后接宾语 her 和宾语补足语 grow，bit by bit 是方式状语。

sentences.text: She was always excited when I appeared outside her window.
sentences.tr: 当我出现在她的窗外时，她总是很兴奋。
sentences.g: 主系表结构 + 时间状语从句
sentences.d: when 引导时间状语从句，always 表示频率。

sentences.text: She laughed as her cat tried to "catch" my brush.
sentences.tr: 当她的猫试图抓住我的刷子时，她笑了。
sentences.g: 主谓结构 + 时间状语从句
sentences.d: as 引导时间状语从句，tried to catch 是不定式作宾语。

sentences.text: Later, she drew a picture of me and showed it to me!
sentences.tr: 后来，她画了一幅我的画并展示给我看！
sentences.d: and 连接两个并列的动词短语 drew 和 showed。

sentences.text: Happiness passed through the glass and into my heart.
sentences.tr: 幸福穿过玻璃进入我的心中。
sentences.d: passed through...and into... 是并列的介词短语作状语。

sentences.text: One day, her mother held up a note for me: the family was moving.
sentences.tr: 有一天，她的母亲为我举起一张纸条：这家人要搬家了。
sentences.g: 主谓宾结构 + 同位语
sentences.d: 冒号后的句子是 note 的同位语，解释纸条的内容。

sentences.text: I felt sad, but also happy that we were once friends.
sentences.tr: 我感到难过，但也很高兴我们曾经是朋友。
sentences.g: 主系表结构（并列句）+ 宾语从句
sentences.d: but 连接两个并列的形容词 sad 和 happy，that 引导宾语从句。

sentences.text: Window cleaning is not always considered a good job, but I'll never regret it.
sentences.tr: 窗户清洁并不总是被认为是一份好工作，但我永远不会后悔。
sentences.g: 主系表结构（被动语态）+ 转折并列句
sentences.d: is considered 是被动语态，but 连接转折关系的两个句子。

sentences.text: I have met a lot of kind people and been part of many warm stories.
sentences.tr: 我遇到了很多善良的人，也成为了许多温暖故事的一部分。
sentences.g: 主谓宾结构（现在完成时）
sentences.d: have met 和 been 是并列的现在完成时动词，表示过去的经历对现在的影响。

sentences.text: I found a sense of achievement in my job.
sentences.tr: 我在工作中找到了成就感。
sentences.d: found 是及物动词，a sense of achievement 是宾语，in my job 是地点状语。

sentences.text: Today I am saying goodbye to my job as a "spiderman".
sentences.tr: 今天我要告别我作为蜘蛛侠的工作。
sentences.g: 主谓宾结构（现在进行时）
sentences.d: am saying goodbye to 是现在进行时，表示正在进行的动作。

sentences.text: And you are going to start your days up in the air.
sentences.tr: 而你们将要开始你们在高空中的日子。
sentences.d: are going to start 是将来时，up in the air 是地点状语。

sentences.text: The city shines brighter because of us, and the job will make us shine, too.
sentences.tr: 这座城市因为我们而更加闪耀，这份工作也会让我们闪耀。
sentences.d: and 连接两个并列句，because of us 是原因状语，will make 是使役动词。

sentences.text: Best wishes to you all!
sentences.tr: 祝你们一切顺利！
sentences.d: 这是一个省略了主语和谓语的祝福语，完整形式是 I send best wishes to you all。

vocabItems.meaningZh: 蜘蛛侠（高空作业工人的昵称）

readingQuestions.stem: What does the word 'spiderman' refer to in this article?
options: A. A superhero from movies
B. A window cleaner who works at high places
C. A person who catches spiders
D. A comic book character
readingQuestions.answer: B. A window cleaner who works at high places
readingQuestions.rationaleZh: 根据文章内容，spiderman 指的是在高空工作的窗户清洁工。

readingQuestions.stem: Why was the watermelon the sweetest of the writer's life?
options: A. Because it was very expensive
B. Because it was given by a kind woman on a hot day
C. Because it was the biggest watermelon
D. Because he was very hungry
readingQuestions.answer: B. Because it was given by a kind woman on a hot day
readingQuestions.rationaleZh: 文章提到在炎热的工作日，一位善良的女士给了他西瓜，这份温暖让西瓜变得特别甜。

readingQuestions.stem: How did the baby girl react when the writer appeared outside her window?
options: A. She cried loudly
B. She was always excited
C. She was scared
D. She ignored him
readingQuestions.rationaleZh: 文章明确提到：She was always excited when I appeared outside her window.

readingQuestions.stem: What can we infer about the writer's attitude towards his job?
options: A. He regrets choosing this job
B. He thinks it's a waste of time
C. He is proud of his work and the connections he made
D. He wants to change to another job
readingQuestions.answer: C. He is proud of his work and the connections he made
readingQuestions.rationaleZh: 文章最后提到他从不后悔这份工作，遇到了很多善良的人，找到了成就感，说明他为自己的工作感到自豪。

readingQuestions.stem: What is the main message of this article?
options: A. Window cleaning is a dangerous job
B. Every job has value and can bring meaningful connections
C. High-rise buildings need regular cleaning
D. People should be kind to workers
readingQuestions.answer: B. Every job has value and can bring meaningful connections
readingQuestions.rationaleZh: 文章通过讲述清洁工的温暖故事，传达了每份工作都有价值，都能带来有意义的人际联系这一主题。

spiderman.meaningZh: 蜘蛛侠（高空作业工人的昵称）
